Package neqsim.process.automation

Class SimulationVariable

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.automation.SimulationVariable
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class SimulationVariable extends Object implements Serializable
Describes a single variable exposed by a unit operation in a process simulation. Each variable has a stable string address that can be used with ProcessAutomation.getVariableValue(String, String) and ProcessAutomation.setVariableValue(String, double, String).
Version:
1.0
Author:
Even Solbraa
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • SimulationVariable

      public SimulationVariable(String address, String name, SimulationVariable.VariableType type, String defaultUnit, String description)
      Creates a new simulation variable descriptor.
      Parameters:
      address - the stable dot-separated address, e.g. "separator-1.gasOutStream.temperature"
      name - the short property name, e.g. "temperature"
      type - whether the variable is INPUT (read-write) or OUTPUT (read-only)
      defaultUnit - the default unit of measure, e.g. "K", "bara", "kg/hr"
      description - a human-readable description

    • SimulationVariable

      private SimulationVariable(String address, String name, SimulationVariable.VariableType type, String defaultUnit, String description, String category, String source, String unitFamily, Double minimumValue, Double maximumValue, List<String> allowedValues, boolean writable, boolean invalidatesProcess, String applicability)
      Creates a fully specified simulation variable descriptor.
      Parameters:
      address - the stable dot-separated address
      name - the short property name
      type - whether the variable is INPUT or OUTPUT
      defaultUnit - the default unit of measure
      description - a human-readable description
      category - variable category such as stream, equipment, or tuning
      source - metadata source identifier
      unitFamily - physical unit family such as temperature or pressure
      minimumValue - optional minimum physically meaningful value
      maximumValue - optional maximum physically meaningful value
      allowedValues - optional allowed symbolic values
      writable - true if the variable can be written through automation
      invalidatesProcess - true if writes require the process to be rerun
      applicability - short note describing when the variable applies

  • Method Details

    • inferUnitFamily

      private static String inferUnitFamily(String defaultUnit)
      Infers a unit family from a default unit string.
      Parameters:
      defaultUnit - default unit string
      Returns:
      unit family name

      public SimulationVariable withCategory(String category)
      Returns a copy with category metadata.
      Parameters:
      category - variable category
      Returns:
      copied variable descriptor

      public SimulationVariable withBounds(Double minimumValue, Double maximumValue)
      Returns a copy with value bounds.
      Parameters:
      minimumValue - optional minimum value
      maximumValue - optional maximum value
      Returns:
      copied variable descriptor

      public SimulationVariable withAllowedValues(String... allowedValues)
      Returns a copy with allowed symbolic values.
      Parameters:
      allowedValues - allowed values
      Returns:
      copied variable descriptor

    • withWritableSafety

      public SimulationVariable withWritableSafety(boolean writable, boolean invalidatesProcess)
      Returns a copy with write-safety metadata.
      Parameters:
      writable - true if writable
      invalidatesProcess - true if writes require rerunning the process
      Returns:
      copied variable descriptor

    • withApplicability

      public SimulationVariable withApplicability(String applicability)
      Returns a copy with applicability text.
      Parameters:
      applicability - applicability note
      Returns:
      copied variable descriptor

    • withUnitFamily

      public SimulationVariable withUnitFamily(String unitFamily)
      Returns a copy with unit family metadata.
      Parameters:
      unitFamily - physical unit family
      Returns:
      copied variable descriptor

    • withSource

      public SimulationVariable withSource(String source)
      Returns a copy with source metadata.
      Parameters:
      source - metadata source identifier
      Returns:
      copied variable descriptor

    • copy

      private SimulationVariable copy(String category, String source, String unitFamily, Double minimumValue, Double maximumValue, List<String> allowedValues, boolean writable, boolean invalidatesProcess, String applicability)
      Creates a copied descriptor with updated metadata.
      Parameters:
      category - variable category
      source - metadata source identifier
      unitFamily - physical unit family
      minimumValue - optional minimum value
      maximumValue - optional maximum value
      allowedValues - allowed symbolic values
      writable - true if writable
      invalidatesProcess - true if writes require process rerun
      applicability - applicability note
      Returns:
      copied variable descriptor

      Returns whether writes require rerunning the process.

      true if writes invalidate current process results
